# hetzner-robot_server (Resource)

Manages an existing dedicated server's **name** (`POST /server/{number}`). It does not create or delete servers — destroying the resource only stops Terraform managing the name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner-robot_server" "worker" {
  server_number = 2093885
  server_name   = "k8s-worker-1"
}
```

Import by server number:

```shell
terraform import hetzner-robot_server.worker 2093885
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_name` (String) Server name
- `server_number` (Number) Server number

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `server_ip` (String) Primary IPv4 address
